title: CodecManifest
description: Language-neutral schema for an OpenECS v1.0 codec manifest. The on-disk form is TOML (see SPEC/OpenECS-v1.0.md §7); this documents the same fields. Mirrors eeg_codec_standard::manifest::CodecManifest.

spec_version.description: OpenECS spec version the manifest targets. Defaults to "1.0".

declared_lossless.description: The codec author's lossless claim. Verified, not trusted.

cmd.description: Binary or script to invoke. Resolved: this path → $ECS_CODEC_<NAME>_BIN → PATH.

prefix_args.description: Fixed tokens inserted before the encode/decode subcommand.

sample_dtype.description: Width of the decode 'raw' output integers. Default i32.

input_format.description: Format of the encode input file. Default edf.

output_format.description: Format of the decode output file. Default raw.

encode_args.description: Optional encode arg template. Placeholders: {input} {output} {channels} {samples} {rate} {dtype}. Omit for the default contract.

decode_args.description: Optional decode arg template. Same placeholders. Omit for the default contract.

env.description: Extra environment variables merged over the ECS_* variables.
